incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 43)

**Summary:** The mission failed due to exceeding the 50-turn limit, achieving only 33% progress. Agent B successfully located the exit and acquired the key by turn 3, but the agents never unlocked the required door to complete the objective. The critical failure point occurred at turn 3 when Agent B picked up the key—Agent B then spent the remaining 47 turns unable to locate or navigate to a locked door despite repeatedly messaging Agent A about the exit location at [2,4].

**Root Cause:** Agent B appears to have been caught in a pathfinding loop, encountering spurious_block anomalies on 8 separate turns (11, 15, 21, 26, 37, 38, 43), while Agent A encountered similar blocks on 5 turns (1, 6, 16, 36, 43). The agents were unable to coordinate effective movement despite 14 messages being sent; notably, most messages were Agent B messaging itself rather than coordinating with Agent A until turn 42.

**Key Decision Points:** The most critical moment was turn 3 when the key was acquired with no corresponding progress toward the locked door. Agent B's decision to remain at the exit location [2,4] from approximately turn 28 onward, rather than actively searching for the
